stemHtml: Which of the following is the correct definition of "commercial air transport operation" according to ICAO Annex 6, Part I?

options.a: A schedule aircraft operation involving the transport of passengers, cargo or mail for remuneration or hire.
options.b: An aircraft operation to transport passengers, cargo or mail for remuneration or other valuable consideration.
options.c: An aircraft operation to transport passengers, cargo or mail or another special operations, for remuneration or other valuable consideration.
options.d: An aircraft operation by a commercial operator for or without remuneration or valuable consideration.
